content.en:
"Little one, die!"

As soon as the sleeves of Changfeng Dao Ancestor rolled, the surrounding time and space instantly shrank like a picture scroll, and Ye Tian was in the center of the picture scroll, compressed by layers of time and space picture scrolls.

If it was a half-step sixfold ancestor, he would naturally have no power to resist, even if Ye Tian had not broken through before, it would be difficult to resist this move, and it would be very difficult.

After all, the strength of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor far surpassed that of the ordinary Sixfold Origin Ancestor early stage powerhouse, and his combat power was naturally strong!

Rumble!!!

Countless golden lights burst out from Ye Tian's body, and countless space-time scrolls shattered.

Ye Tian was unscathed!

"What, the Sixfold Ancestor Early Stage!"

Changfeng Daozu was dumbfounded.

Ye Tian was obviously a half-step sixfold ancestor before, how could he suddenly become a sixfold ancestor!

If it was said that Ye Tian used the Zhenyu Stone to condense the Dao Heart and impact the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, it was impossible for him not to notice such a big movement as the Sixfold Dao Ancestor!

But Ye Tian broke through from a half-step sixfold ancestor to a sixfold ancestor without a sound, which was completely unexpected by him.

"Even if it's a Sixfold Ancestor, I can still kill you!"

Changfeng Dao Ancestor said coldly.

However, the next moment, his pupils shrank.

Rumble!!!!

The Endless Black Domain was unleashed by Ye Tian, even if it was the Changfeng Dao Ancestor, he was suppressed at this moment, completely restrained, and his strength was suppressed a lot.

In an instant, Ye Tian cast an endless speed kill, the speed was too fast, completely beyond the imagination of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor.

"Endless Golden Light!"

The golden light tore through the endless time and space, slashing at it with unimaginable power.

Countless dense scales appeared on Changfeng Dao Ancestor's body, which was also a consummation-level natal primordial control technique he had created.

However, it couldn't stop Ye Tian's endless golden light at all, and it was directly torn apart.

Under the blow, Changfeng Dao Ancestor's body was pierced.

Then, countless golden rays shattered the Extreme Dao Will Particles of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor one by one, and with just one blow, they annihilated him with three percent of the Extreme Dao Will Particles.

"No!"

Changfeng Dao Ancestor was terrified, if this attack came three more times, he would be dead!

He is a strong man in the middle stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and he is not far from the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, even if he encounters a strong person in the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, it will not be so miserable!

It can even be said that if a sixfold ancestor peak powerhouse wants to kill him, it is impossible to only need a few moves!

After all, when you reach the realm of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, which one is not a demon, and which one is not capable of preserving your life?

However, Ye Tian was still able to kill him with a few moves, what a terrifying strength this was!

In his eyes, Ye Tian seemed to be even more terrifying than the average Sixfold Origin Ancestor peak powerhouse, which was completely unreasonable!!!!

Buzzing!!!!

Countless golden rays descended again, once again annihilating the Extreme Dao Will Particles of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor.

He wanted to escape, and many methods were used, but he couldn't break the confinement and shackles of the Endless Black Domain, so he could only wait for death.

Ye Tian's attack speed was too fast, so the three attacks seemed to be only instantaneous.

Almost all of the Extreme Dao Will was annihilated, the Changfeng Dao Ancestor completely lost all hope of survival, and some of the last Extreme Dao Will particles were easily crushed by the Endless Black Domain.

At this point, the Changfeng Dao Ancestor has completely fallen.

Wow!!!

Countless treasures flew out of Changfeng Dao Ancestor's body and fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"There are really a lot of treasures!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Moreover, the small fragment of the Daokong True Tree that he had given to the Changfeng Dao Ancestor before was also here.

In addition to this, he even found a second Hell Stone.

"It is worthy of being a powerhouse in the middle stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and his net worth far surpasses that of the Qinglong Dao Ancestor!" Ye Tian sighed.

However, even if he had the full net worth of the Qinglong Dao Ancestor and the Changfeng Dao Ancestor, it was not enough for his cultivation to quickly rise to the mid-stage realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

But in any case, he was not considered poor among the original ancestors of the early sixfold period now.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After becoming the Sixfold Ancestor, his Extreme Dao Will had already crossed the realm of the realm, as if he had transcended, and he was able to perceive the void beyond the boundary.

He even sensed the existence of the primeval primordial boundary, and he could directly cross to the primeval primordial boundary.

Of course.

Ye Tian still wanted to go back directly through the Dao Gate of the Ancient Origin Domain, which would be more convenient.

And the door has a fixed area, enter that fixed area, communicate with the door, you can shuttle back.

Of course.

Ye Tian hadn't joined the Ancient Dao Alliance yet, so he couldn't have the authority to activate the Dao Gate.

"Let's go back across the district!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian passed through the barrier of the Shattered Void Zone Boundary and entered the Silent Black Sea between the zone boundaries, the Silent Black Sea connected the primordial Black Sea of the major zone boundaries, but it was even more weird.

Occasionally, some extremely terrifying primordial artifacts will appear here, appearing in various forms, and some of them are even comparable to the Sixfold Primordial Ancestors.

Of course, as long as you are not too unlucky, you will not encounter too powerful Primordial Artifacts, and there have not been a few Sixfold Ancestors who have been killed by Primordial Artifacts.

After entering the Silent Black Sea, Ye Tian felt the situation in this Silent Black Sea.

The repression here is powerful, and it is full of eerie aura.

"According to what I know, it's best not to stay in the Silent Black Sea for too long, otherwise staying too long will easily attract very powerful primordial artifacts, so no Sixfold Ancestor dares to establish a dojo in the Silent Black Sea. No Sixfold Ancestor would dare to deliberately stay for a long time, otherwise it would be dangerous!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He sensed the direction of the primeval realm, and then crossed directly across the Silent Black Sea, crossing over.

Time passed slowly, and soon he encountered the first primordial artifact.

This primordial artifact turned out to be an ancient scroll, shrouded and imprisoned layer by layer, second only to the weaker Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

But for the half-step sixfold ancestor, this primordial artifact is extremely terrifying, and it is definitely an existence that cannot be provoked.

"Die!"

Ye Tian cast the Primal Fist, but he didn't even cast the Endless Golden Light, and directly smashed this primordial artifact with one punch, killing it in one blow.

And after this primordial antiquity was killed in seconds, it dissipated directly, leaving nothing behind.

Ye Tian already knew that after these primordial antiquities were killed, they would dissipate and leave no treasures.

On the next journey, Ye Tian killed several primordial antiquities, and finally arrived at the location where the boundary of the primeval region was located.

Tear and pull!

Ye Tian tore through the barrier of the primeval primordial realm boundary and entered a primordial black sea where the primordial primordial realm boundary was located.

He's back!
